title: Register for Online Social Security (employer)
description: Open an online employer account with the NIS so you can pay contributions and report new hires.
summary: The NIS Online Social Security Service has a separate area for employers. With an account, you can submit your monthly contribution returns, pay contributions and register new hires without coming into the office.
You need to register your business once. The authorised contact named on the form will be the person who logs in and runs the account.
Bring your certificate of incorporation or business registration, plus photo ID for the authorised contact. If the contact changes later, send a new registration form to update the record.
Most active employers in Barbados now manage their NIS obligations through this portal.

items: the address and parish of the business
an email address and phone number for an authorised contact

items.name: Certificate of incorporation or business registration
Photo ID for the authorised contact

how_long: Your account is usually active within 5 working days.

options.heading: In person
content: Take the completed Online Social Security Service Registration (Employer) form to the National Insurance Office.

assumptions: ‘Account is usually active within 5 working days’ is an estimate.
‘Most active employers now manage their NIS obligations through this portal’ is a working assumption.
